audienceSections.normal: This chapter teaches [[grammar:ngoài ra, clause]]. Use ngoài ra to add another relevant point. This chapter teaches [[grammar:làm ơn + V]]. Put làm ơn before an action to make a polite request.
audienceSections.expert: This chapter introduces [[grammar:ngoài ra, clause]]: Ngoài ra functions as an additive discourse linker introducing an additional proposition. This chapter introduces [[grammar:làm ơn + V]]: Làm ơn is a conventional politeness expression preceding an imperative/request predicate.

audienceSections.normal:
#### ngoài ra, clause

Use ngoài ra to add another relevant point. Example: [[grammar:Tôi tìm tiểu thuyết.]]

#### làm ơn + V

Put làm ơn before an action to make a polite request. Example: [[grammar:Làm ơn tra cứu danh mục.]]
audienceSections.expert:
#### ngoài ra, clause

Ngoài ra functions as an additive discourse linker introducing an additional proposition. Literal example: [[grammar:Tôi tìm tiểu thuyết.]]

#### làm ơn + V

Làm ơn is a conventional politeness expression preceding an imperative/request predicate. Literal example: [[grammar:Làm ơn tra cứu danh mục.]]

audienceSections.normal: Ngoài ra adds a separate point. Làm ơn makes a request polite, but actual register also depends on voice, relationship, and the rest of the sentence.
audienceSections.expert: Ngoài ra adds a separate point. Làm ơn makes a request polite, but actual register also depends on voice, relationship, and the rest of the sentence. The grammar IDs remain distinct and cumulative.

breakdown.normal:
- [[grammar:Tôi tìm tiểu thuyết.]] — I am looking for a novel.
- [[grammar:Làm ơn tra cứu danh mục.]] — Please consult the catalogue.
- [[grammar:Danh mục có tác giả không?]] — Does the catalogue list the author?
- [[grammar:Có. Mục lục ở đây.]] — Yes. The table of contents is here.
- [[grammar:Bàn thông tin ở đây.]] — The information desk is here.
- [[grammar:Ngoài ra, thư viện có tạp chí.]] — In addition, the library has magazines.
- [[grammar:Tôi đọc mục lục.]] — I read the table of contents.
- [[grammar:Làm ơn chọn tiểu thuyết.]] — Please choose a novel.
- [[grammar:Tôi chọn tác giả này.]] — I choose this author.
- [[grammar:Ngoài ra, tác giả có báo cáo.]] — In addition, the author has a report.
- [[grammar:Tôi tra cứu tài liệu.]] — I look up the document.
- [[grammar:Vâng.]] — Yes.
